description: Add Room database persistence to the TaskTracker Android project. Configure the project with the KSP Gradle plugin (id: "com.google.devtools.ksp", version: "1.9.22-1.0.17") and Room version 2.6.1 dependencies (runtime, ktx, and ksp compiler). Implement the database layer within the com.example.tasktracker.data package. Create a Task entity at app/src/main/java/com/example/tasktracker/data/Task.kt with an auto-generated Int primary key (id), a String title, a nullable String description, a Boolean isCompleted (default false), and a Long createdAt. Define a TaskDao interface at app/src/main/java/com/example/tasktracker/data/TaskDao.kt with methods to retrieve all tasks (ordered by createdAt DESC), retrieve by ID, insert, update, delete, and delete all. Establish the AppDatabase class at app/src/main/java/com/example/tasktracker/data/AppDatabase.kt as a RoomDatabase subclass managing the Task entity. The final project must build successfully.
